methods.description: Process for staining pollen and ovary samples using I2-KI solution to visualize starch presence in glasshouse experiments.

steps.description: Five anthers were harvested from each plant, and pollen was released by gentle pressure in 50 µL NanoPure water.
steps.searchable_summary: harvest anthers and release pollen in water

steps.description: Staining solution was added to the pollen, which was then incubated for 1 min at room temperature.
steps.searchable_summary: add staining solution to pollen and incubate

steps.description: After washing, stained pollen was viewed using a Leica TCS-SP8 confocal microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: view stained pollen under confocal microscope

steps.description: Ovaries with anthers were obtained from each plant and I2-KI staining was performed.
steps.searchable_summary: perform I2-KI staining on ovaries with anthers

methods.description: Procedures for measuring soluble and reducing sugars in plant samples using colorimetric methods.

steps.description: Measurements of soluble sugars in the main stem ear and flag leaf were performed with the anthrone colorimetric method using a Plant Soluble Sugar assay kit according to the manufacturer's protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: measure soluble sugars using anthrone colorimetric method

steps.description: Measurements of reducing sugars in the main stem ear and flag leaf were performed with 3,5-dinitrosalicylic acid (DNS) reagent using a Reducing Sugar assay kit according to the manufacturer's protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: measure reducing sugars using DNS reagent
